name: Granting Of Permissions To An Account
notes: To detect when users grant permissions on Azure (i.e., roleAssignments/write) — especially from new/unseen IPs.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Azure Platform
when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/write%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Granting Of Permissions To An Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Azure Platform
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/write%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Granting Of Permissions To An Account
Event description: Granting Of Permissions To An Account
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
